news.t: There's no hotter area on Wall Street than ESG with sustainability-focused funds nearing $2 trillion
ESG Investing Boom Is Bullish For Cleantech
Sustainable investment funds just surpassed $1 trillion for the first time on record
Watch out for this trend in ESG investments, Wharton's Jeremy Siegel warns

holdings.infoBox: ESGD is an equity ETF with a total of 384 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.64%, Novartis AG at 1.51%, HSBC Holdings at 1.49%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 1.20%, and Roche Holding AG at 1.16%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware MSCI EAFE ETF (ESGD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE Extended ESG Focus index. The fund tracks an index of developed market international companies that have been selected and weighted for positive environmental, social, and governance characteristics. ESGD was launched on Jun 28, 2016 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI EAFE Extended ESG Focus Index

data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani with Vettafi's Dave Nadig and DWS Group's Arne Noack, join 'Halftime Report' to discuss climate control and cryptocurrency ahead of the SEC hearings.

data.title: There's no hotter area on Wall Street than ESG with sustainability-focused funds nearing $2 trillion
data.text: Record inflows into sustainability-focused funds during the first quarter pushed total assets to nearly $2 trillion.

data.title: Sustainable investment funds just surpassed $1 trillion for the first time on record
data.text: It comes amid growing investor interest in sustainable investment funds in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic.

data.title: Watch out for this trend in ESG investments, Wharton's Jeremy Siegel warns
data.text: Interest in ESG (environmental, social and governance) investments is heating up, but there's a trend investors should watch out for before climbing aboard, Wharton's Jeremy Siegel says.
